topics.title: Radio Show Segment and Guest Review
topics.summary: The studio discusses listener feedback on an interview with Artemis Pyle, reviews various comedy phone calls, and shares anecdotes about local dining experiences.

topics.title: Raw Food Dining and Upcoming Music Specials
topics.summary: The studio discusses raw food dining experiences in New York and Los Angeles, a local restaurant's unique menu, and upcoming musical specials featuring various artists.

topics.title: New Show and Mike Tyson Highlights
topics.summary: The studio promotes a new series called Stern Spotlight featuring former show guests while discussing various pop culture clips, including the "Leroy Jenkins" meme and highlights of Mike Tyson's boxing career.

topics.title: Video Game Culture and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The show features a discussion of the "Leroy Jenkins" video game clip, reflections on Black History Month, and commentary on sports media coverage of Rex Grossman.

topics.title: Cheating Advice and Life Coaching
topics.summary: The show features a discussion with an author who provides tips on how to maintain secret affairs and avoid detection while offering life coaching services.

topics.title: Howard TV and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming segments for Howard TV, including a Bigfoot special and an Anna Nicole Smith retrospective, while also reviewing various website statistics and personal anecdotes.

topics.title: The Biggest Loser Contestant and Plastic Surgery Guest
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with a former "Biggest Loser" contestant regarding his weight loss journey followed by an interview with a stripper seeking breast replacement surgery.

topics.title: Breast Enhancement Procedures and Patient Interaction
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with a plastic surgeon regarding breast implants, the differences between saline and silicone, and an interactive segment where listeners and staff are invited to feel the patient's breasts while she uses a vibrating device.

topics.title: Anna Nicole Smith and Howard K. Stern
topics.summary: The studio discusses the aftermath of Anna Nicole Smith's death, including reports on her personal life, a media report regarding a name confusion between the deceased and Howard K. Stern, and various reactions from the Whack Pack.

topics.title: Legal Complications of Anna Nicole Smith Estate
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal complexities surrounding the custody of Anna Nicole Smith's child, the ethics of Howard K. Stern serving as executor of her will, and the potential for a DNA test to identify the biological father.

topics.title: Anna Nicole Smith and Howard Stern Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the tragic death of Anna Nicole Smith, her relationship with Howard Stern, and allegations regarding drug use and paternity claims involving Larry Birkhead.

topics.title: The Police Reunion Tour
topics.summary: The studio discusses Sting and The Police announcing a new tour featuring their classic material.

topics.title: Music Analysis and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the musical dynamics of The Police and Cream, the legal controversies surrounding Bill Cosby, and recent media coverage regarding Anna Nicole Smith.

topics.title: Current Events and Comedy News
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the career of Sour Shoes, reports on adoption statistics, updates on presidential candidates, international relations regarding North Korea and Iran, a shooting in Utah, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
